--[[ your local aura farmer is low-key gonna slime you twin ]] return(function(...)local m={"\067\055\055\117\071\043\113\061";"\079\107\054\075\087\057\106\105\079\111\070\084\052\057\048\069\047\111\055\061";"\110\077\080\089\047\097\065\072\108\056\082\072\065\119\087\076\104\048\061\061";"\119\084\088\056\117\052\067\121\104\120\055\061","\122\055\100\065","\047\097\074\051\052\076\117\066","\073\107\065\051\047\076\047\120\083\076\119\061","\087\053\051\112";"\052\076\082\099\052\077\074\085\047\102\088\061","\047\086\117\074\108\055\061\061","\047\074\079\061";"","\047\109\117\108\047\109\078\069\117\056\111\056\073\065\051\084\087\113\061\061","\100\097\082\080\083\086\088\084","\122\043\116\051\072\101\100\115\087\102\052\118","\086\086\100\114","\073\097\065\056\083\077\065\056\108\102\087\051\108\107\114\111","\111\117\078\089","\104\079\065\109","\102\074\082\090\047\102\087\051\052\076\054\085\083\076\119\061";"\087\104\070\114\117\084\070\089\083\111\054\109\098\112\106\072\098\102\073\061";"\052\107\043\078\087\065\066\114\050\097\111\090\104\107\074\105","\108\112\111\056\047\100\061\061","\083\077\054\056\050\048\061\061","\068\055\061\061";"\104\097\114\090\100\119\100\043\083\084\106\057\079\077\111\089\117\048\061\061","\073\107\054\099\047\076\082\090";"\047\102\106\089\083\086\088\061";"\052\097\069\097\087\097\065\076\087\077\052\074\077\076\056\097\083\113\061\061","\048\068\076\086\090\051\075\087\085\100\061\061";"\080\113\083\067","\051\114\085\114\048\051\048\061";"\102\074\082\120\083\107\087\111\098\048\061\061";"\056\066\104\082\077\055\043\121\077\118\089\122\104\043\056\065\055\081\121\061","\056\085\118\087","\073\086\087\089\050\077\043\112","\109\122\122\087\047\099\117\056\085\112\110\117\067\097\079\107","\102\074\082\112\108\113\061\061","\117\102\051\065\068\065\071\075\047\084\100\056\098\102\047\085";"\052\077\043\113\108\077\117\105";"\110\068\072\099\086\082\098\074\078\076\090\108\066\055\118\055";"\098\090\078\114\090\074\112\097\079\101\104\113\075\087\049\111\103\120\073\043";"\099\120\084\111\048\085\097\1 end,function(m,P)local W=E(P)local r=function(r,y,B,i,s)return D(m,{r,y,B,i;s},P,W)end return r end,function(m,P)local W=E(P)local r=function(...)return D(m,{...},P,W)end return r end,function(m,P)local W=E(P)local r=function()return D(m,{},P,W)end return r end,function(m)for P=251061+-251060,#m,-569808+569809 do L[m[P]]=(279386+-279385)+L[m[P]]end if r then local D=r(true)local W=B(D)W[P(-653089+623911)],W[P(504188-533361)],W[P(23398-52522)]=m,w,function()return-961306+-1656982 end return D else return y({},{[P(13212-42385)]=w;[P(621312+-650490)]=m;[P(10813+-39937)]=function()return-2956436-(-338148)end})end end return(l(-616440+2528336,{}))(W(s))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[P(-851516+822345)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
